items.title: 'Tough day:' Flick mourns dad as Barça win LaLiga
items.summary: Barcelona coach Hansi Flick said it had been a "tough day" after guiding his team to the LaLiga title against Real Madrid just hours after learning of the death of his father.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.
